_publications._publicationTitle: Activation of Sonic hedgehog signaling in neural progenitor cells promotes glioma development in the zebrafish optic pathway.

_contextSnippet: We also observed spiraling or spinning swimming behavior in 8 out of 92 F2 transgenic fish between the ages of 6 and 12 months
details: Caused spiraling or spinning swimming behavior in 8 out of 92 F2 transgenic fish between ages 6-12 months
